title: Three Months In: A Milestone Celebration!

topics.title: npmx Development Milestone
topics.summary: @npmx.dev celebrates its 3-month anniversary, reflecting on the rapid changes and progress made in a short time. The community is encouraged to engage as the platform evolves, marking a significant milestone in its development journey.

topics.title: Modern Package Management
topics.summary: Users appreciate how @npmx.dev highlights adherence to modern practices in package management. This feature enhances transparency and encourages developers to follow best practices, contributing to a healthier ecosystem for package development.
